hero.badge: Version 3.4.0 — Simpler, smarter, faster, everything you need in one place
hero.title: Yusr
hero.subtitle: An integrated accounting software to manage your business
hero.description: A cloud-based accounting software that helps you manage your accounts, invoices, sales, and expenses with ease. It features a simple and flexible interface, allowing you to track your business from anywhere at any time, while ensuring the security and accuracy of your data.

features.title: Built-in Applications in the System
features.description: All system features are available instantly, without complexity or additional configuration

items.title: Invoices
items.desc: Create and track invoices, including electronic and tax invoices, seamlessly.

items.title: Accounts
items.desc: Manage all accounts in one place: suppliers, customers, employees, and bank accounts.

items.title: Inventory
items.desc: Track every product and service accurately, with easy inventory organization to keep your business under control.

items.title: Stores
items.desc: Manage unlimited warehouses while tracking every stock movement in and out accurately and smoothly.

items.title: Vouchers
items.desc: Issue and track vouchers accurately to simplify money and internal account management.
details: Multiple cash boxes and bank accounts

items.title: Users & Roles
items.desc: Full control over your team — create user accounts, assign roles, and define precise permissions for each user.

whyUs.title: Why is Yusr the perfect partner for your business?
whyUs.description: A system designed specifically for business needs — no complexity and no compromise on quality

items.title: Free technical support available
items.desc: Always available for free, to help you with any inquiry or problem quickly and effectively.

items.title: Security & Protection
items.desc: Yusr gives full attention to the safety of your data on fully secure servers.

items.title: Easy-to-use interface
items.desc: Manage your business easily through a clear and simple Arabic interface, with built-in tools that don't require deep expertise.

items.title: Save time and effort
items.desc: Track your business indicators and manage your operations quickly and efficiently, with easy steps that save you time and effort.

items.title: From anywhere, anytime
items.desc: Being a cloud-based system, you can access it from any device at any time.

items.title: Free periodic updates
items.desc: The software is constantly updated to add new features and tools, and you get them for free.

items.title: Economic price
items.desc: Get a complete accounting system with a simple monthly subscription, with continuous technical support and free updates.

cta.title: Stop the chaos in managing your accounts — start with Yusr today
cta.description: Log in and start using immediately with no complex setup

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: One subscription includes everything — no hidden costs
